description_long: This is a modern smartwatch with a rectangular face and rounded edges, featuring a sleek, dark-colored case and a matching silicone or rubber strap. The display shows a digital interface with a car graphic, battery percentage, and large digital time, suggesting a customizable or themed watch face. The side of the watch includes a prominent crown and a button, likely for navigation and interaction. The strap is smooth, flexible, and has multiple adjustment holes for a secure fit, with a visible sensor area on the underside for health or fitness tracking. The overall design is minimalist and sporty, with a glossy finish that enhances its contemporary appeal. No visible traditional watch hands or indices are present, emphasizing its digital nature.
description: A sleek, rectangular digital smartwatch with a dark, glossy case and matching silicone strap, featuring a customizable display and side controls. The design is minimalist and sporty, with a smooth, modern finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the digital display with a car graphic, battery indicator, and large digital time, framed by a glossy, dark bezel.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the crown and button on the right, as well as the smooth curvature of the strap and case.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the strap's width and adjustment holes, with the sensor area partially visible underneath.
description_view_3: Angled side view reveals the underside of the watch, including the sensor area and the strap's attachment points.
attribute_brand_logo: The display shows the text 'SDC PERFORMANCE' in the upper left corner, which appears to be a brand or model logo, rendered in a modern sans-serif font directly on the digital dial.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is fully digital, featuring a grayscale car graphic as the background, a battery percentage indicator in the upper right, and large digital numerals for the time at the bottom. The style is modern and themed, with no traditional markers or hands, and a minimalist, high-contrast layout.
attribute_strap_type: Smooth silicone or rubber strap with multiple adjustment holes and a standard buckle, designed for comfort and flexibility.
attribute_watch_face_display: Digital display with large, bold numerals for the time, battery indicator, and a themed graphic. No analog hands or indices are present, emphasizing a fully digital, customizable interface.
